hero.subtitle: Your time matters. Find parking instantly with Parko Tani — the smart parking app for Tirana.
hero.tagline: Parko Tani — end the parking drama.

stats.title: Everything in real time
stats.subtitle: See every open parking spot across Tirana — updated live, before you even leave home.

howItWorks.title: Park smarter
howItWorks.step1Body: See all available parking spots near you across Tirana, updated in real time with color-coded availability.
howItWorks.step2Body: Tap any parking spot and reserve it instantly. No queues, no stress.
howItWorks.step3Body: Navigate directly to your spot and park with confidence. It's yours.

items.title: Real-time availability
items.body: See instantly where parking spots are free, without wasting time driving around.

items.title: Zero wasted time
items.body: No more circling streets. Find and reserve your spot before you even leave.

items.title: Less traffic, less stress
items.body: When everyone parks faster, the city moves better. You save time, the city saves air.

business.title: Earn from
business.subtitle: Have parking spots? List them on Parko Tani and start earning.

features.title: List parking spots
features.body: Add your spots to the map and manage them easily.

features.title: Accept / Reject reservations
features.body: Full control over who parks at your location.

features.title: Earn income
features.body: Turn your parking spots into a revenue stream.

about.title: Built for
about.body1: Parko Tani was born from a simple problem: every day, hundreds of drivers in Tirana waste time searching for parking. We built this app to end that drama.
about.body2: Our mission is simple — make parking in Tirana fast, easy, and stress-free. Let's change how the city moves!
about.mission: Our mission: A city where finding a parking spot is never a problem, because you've already found it.

screenshots.title: Everything you need,
screenshots.subtitle: From finding a spot to tracking your bookings — Parko Tani keeps it simple.
screenshots.screen1Caption: Find parking and manage your active reservations
screenshots.screen2Caption: All your bookings in one place

download.title: Ready to
download.subtitle: Download Parko Tani for free and find your parking spot in seconds.

footer.description: The smart parking app for Tirana. Find, reserve, and park — instantly.
